title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
evidence: Company says it may invest up to $250M in alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin.
extracted_fact: MicroStrategy anunció una estrategia de asignación de capital que incluye compras de acciones y activos alternativos, entre ellos activos digitales como el bitcoin

title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
evidence: Company purchases 21,454 bitcoins and states Bitcoin is now the principal holding in treasury reserve strategy.
extracted_fact: MicroStrategy adquiere Bitcoin como activo principal de reserva de tesorería con un monto de $250M

title: MicroStrategy closes $650M convertible note offering and intends to invest proceeds in Bitcoin
evidence: Net proceeds from convertible senior notes are intended for Bitcoin purchases under the Treasury Reserve Policy.
extracted_fact: MicroStrategy emitió un bono convertible por $650 millones con intención de invertir los fondos en Bitcoin
